repository_intake_record.name: shiro
repository_intake_record.selection_reason: Listed in TRACE4QR WP2 seed set (MD §5). Apache Shiro is an application security framework providing authentication, authorization, cryptographic services, session security, credential hashing, certificate handling, and enterprise security workflow scenarios. High-density cryptographic usage: dedicated crypto module with cipher, hash, and KDF sub-modules (AES/GCM, SHA-256/384/512, BCrypt, Argon2). Satisfies all eligibility criteria: Apache-2.0 license, pinnable commit SHA, meaningful Java source, improves cryptographic pattern coverage.
